items.line_en: Sadly, we live in a world where there's a lot of crime, and the news is often full of

coach.say: Sadly, we live in a world where there's a lot of crime, and the news is often full of
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sadly, / we live in a world where there's a lot of crime, / and the news is often full of
Chunk it: the latest criminal activities.

items.line_en: Every day there seems to be a report of a robbery in a bank or post office, or of a

coach.say: Every day there seems to be a report of a robbery in a bank or post office, or of a
coach.hint: Chunk it: Every day there seems to be a report of a robbery in a bank or post office, / or of a

items.line_en: mugging where someone is attacked in the street for their wallet, or vandalism,

coach.say: mugging where someone is attacked in the street for their wallet, or vandalism,
coach.hint: Chunk it: mugging where someone is attacked in the street for their wallet, / or vandalism,

items.line_en: where vandals have attacked a car or building.

coach.say: where vandals have attacked a car or building.
coach.hint: Chunk it: where vandals have attacked a car or / building.

items.line_en: Some crimes are not reported in the news, for example burglary, which is theft from a house,

coach.say: Some crimes are not reported in the news, for example burglary, which is theft from a house,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Some crimes are not reported in the news, / for example burglary, / which is theft from a house,

items.line_en: or pickpocketing, where your purse is taken in public places like on a bus or train, or

coach.say: or pickpocketing, where your purse is taken in public places like on a bus or train, or
coach.hint: Chunk it: or pickpocketing, / where your purse is taken in public places like on a bus or train, / or

items.line_en: even shoplifting, which is theft from a shop.

coach.say: even shoplifting, which is theft from a shop.
coach.hint: Chunk it: even shoplifting, / which is theft from a shop.

items.line_en: But important crimes like murder, when a murderer kills another person, or kidnapping,

coach.say: But important crimes like murder, when a murderer kills another person, or kidnapping,
coach.hint: Chunk it: But important crimes like murder, / when a murderer kills another person, / or kidnapping,

items.line_en: where criminals take someone prisoner against their will and demand a ransom.

coach.say: where criminals take someone prisoner against their will and demand a ransom.
coach.hint: Chunk it: where criminals take someone prisoner against their will and / demand a ransom.

items.line_en: These crimes are always in the news.

coach.say: These crimes are always in the news.
coach.hint: Chunk it: These crimes are always in the news.

items.line_en: Recently there were headlines about hijacking, because terrorists had taken over an airplane

coach.say: Recently there were headlines about hijacking, because terrorists had taken over an airplane
coach.hint: Chunk it: Recently there were headlines about hijacking, / because terrorists had taken over an airplane

items.line_en: before demanding the release of political prisoners.

coach.say: before demanding the release of political prisoners.
coach.hint: Chunk it: before demanding the release of political prisoners.

items.line_en: One more crime we can mention is blackmail.

coach.say: One more crime we can mention is blackmail.
coach.hint: Chunk it: One more crime we can mention is blackmail.

items.line_en: This is not a common crime, and often remains a secret between the blackmailer and the victim,

coach.say: This is not a common crime, and often remains a secret between the blackmailer and the victim,
